title: Spine Event Contract
description: Interface contract for all structured events flowing through the Chorus spine. Single source of truth for event types, fields, and vertebra mapping.

envelope.description: Required fields on every spine event

event.description: Event type name. #3513 naming law — FOUR patterns: (1) verb-phase `<verb>.<phase>` for the 7 werk verbs; (2) verb-substep `<substep>.<x>` (mechanical step nested under its parent verb); (3) card-lifecycle `card.*` (card state); (4) sequencer namespaces `werk.*` / `demo.*` / `env.*` / `review.*` (declared orchestrators/ceremonies, not verbs). Legacy `domain.noun.verb_past` still valid for non-werk domains. Must match an entry in `events`.

product.description: Product derived from appName via product_map (#3140)

value_stream_step.description: Werk stage from event vertebra via value_stream_map (#3140)

capturing.description: Card creation — Jeff pulls work into the flow

directing.description: Card sequencing — moving cards through the board

operations.description: Operating — infrastructure health, deploys, and system lifecycle

hook.decision.description: Uniform decision record emitted by the hook dispatch IoC seam (#3252) on every Pre/PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, and Stop dispatch. Carries the shared werk `trace` join key so `grep <trace_id>` over chorus.log + hooks.log threads hook decisions with demo/build/deploy verbs (#3023/#3270) into one call flow.

fields.hook: Dispatch point — pre_tool_use | post_tool_use | user_prompt_submit | stop_hook
fields.tool: Tool name under dispatch (Bash, Edit, Read, …); empty for prompt/stop
fields.module: Deciding hook module, or none / prompt_pipeline / autonomy_guard for aggregate paths
fields.trace: Shared werk trace_id (CHORUS_TRACE_ID) when in a werk run, else a minted per-dispatch fallback
fields.session_id: Claude Code session id (8-char) — secondary join key for ad-hoc tool calls

ac.ticked.description: AC item checked on a card — `- [ ]` → `- [x]`. Emitted per update that advances the check count. #2193.

fields.ticked_count: Number of items flipped from unchecked to checked in this update

board.audit.closed.description: Board audit at session close — checks for retroactive cards

board.audit.started.description: Board audit initiated at session start

board.limit.set.description: WIP limit set on a board bucket

brief.handoff.acknowledged.description: Brief surfaced at boot by werk-init — closes the send/receive chain (#616)

brief.handoff.read.description: Brief file read/consumed by receiving role

brief.handoff.written.description: Brief file written to a role's briefs/ directory

brief.notify.sent.description: macOS banner notification sent for brief delivery (#616)

build.artifact.hashed.description: Built+signed binary hashed post-codesign — invariant evidence for build-domain (#2775). Same source commit must produce identical sha256 across machines.

fields.builder_host: Hostname of machine that built it

build.commit.linked.description: Commit linked to a card via (#N) or (C#N) reference

build.completed.description: Building-pipeline build step finished for one crate (#2774). Emitted by chorus-build CLI after all binaries in the crate are signed and recorded in the manifest. Per-binary detail lives in build.artifact.hashed; this event is the crate-level signal the act workflow sequences on. duration_ms enables Loki histogram for build-cache rot detection.

fields.commit: Source commit SHA (short) at build time
fields.duration_ms: End-to-end build slice duration in milliseconds
fields.builder_host: Hostname of machine that built it

build.failed.description: Building-pipeline build step failed for one crate (#2774 review feedback from Kade). Emitted by chorus-build CLI before non-zero exit. Consumers of build outcomes (crawler hydrator, dashboards) should bind to this event for failure cases — never to absence of build.completed.

fields.commit: Source commit SHA (short) at build time
fields.reason: Coarse failure class (build-signed-fail today; finer classes added as named)
fields.builder_host: Hostname of machine that built it
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

build.memory.written.description: State file or memory file updated in a commit

build.precommit.timed.description: App repo pre-commit hook overall timing

build.prepush.timed.description: App repo pre-push hook overall timing

build.queue.timedout.description: Git commit lock acquisition timed out (30s)

build.queue.waiting.description: Role waiting to acquire git commit lock

canonical.recovery.completed.description: chorus-werk-sync recover finished — stashed zero or more files and synced canonical to origin/main tip (#2909). Pairs each `canonical.recovery.stashed` emit with a completion record so a fitness function can detect started-without-completed cases.

fields.recovered: Count of files stashed in this run (0 = no-op, tree was already clean)
fields.to: Short sha of canonical HEAD after sync

canonical.recovery.stashed.description: chorus-werk-sync recover moved a real uncommitted file out of canonical to ~/.chorus/recovery/<ts>/ before syncing. Lossless auto-recovery (#2909). Emitted once per stashed file. Replaces the pre-#2909 manual stash+pull workaround. Loki alert downstream surfaces the event so the team sees work landed in recovery.

fields.recovery_path: Absolute path under ~/.chorus/recovery/<ts>/ where the content was copied
fields.sha: sha256 of stashed content (empty if file was D-state — already deleted from disk)

canonical.sync.repaired.description: chorus-werk-sync auto-repaired a recoverable abort case (e.g., detached HEAD) when run with --auto-repair / CHORUS_WERK_SYNC_AUTO_REPAIR=1 (#2846). Distinguishes scheduled-recovery from operator-invoked `repair` (which emits canonical.repaired).

card.accepted.description: Card accepted after demo (DEC-048 Proving gate)

card.blast_radius.failed.description: Blast radius generation failed — card has 0 files on a code card

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

card.bulk.moved.description: Multiple cards moved in a single bulk operation

card.demo.started.description: Demo started for card (DEC-048 Proving gate)

card.item.created.description: New card added to the board

card.item.moved.description: Card moved to a different bucket/status

card.item.reassigned.description: Card ownership changed to a different role

card.item.tagged.description: Label or tag added to a card

card.pulled.description: Card pulled to WIP — role started building

card.quality.warned.description: Quality gate warning — title too short, empty description, or no comments at done

card.quick.created.description: Card created with --quick flag, skipping full AC requirement

card.rejected.description: Card rejected after demo with reason

card.sequence.bulk_tagged.description: Multiple cards tagged with a sequence label in bulk

card.stale.detected.description: Card detected as stale during board audit (>48h in Now/WIP, >7d in Next)

card.swat.created.description: SWAT card created — crisis fast-lane card outside WIP limit (DEC-055)

card.unblocked.description: Card moved from Blocked back to Next

chat.session.started.description: Chat channel opened between two roles

commit.landed.description: Commit landed on main via git-queue.sh. Emitted after successful commit, before push. #2193.

fields.card_id: Card id extracted from commit message, if present
fields.files_changed: Number of files in the commit

crawler.graph.failed.description: Crawler hydrator failed to write to Fuseki — batch insert failures, stale-update HTTP errors, or Fuseki unreachable (#2827).

fields.class: Hydratable class identifier; '*' when Fuseki itself is unreachable
fields.duration_ms: Duration when known; absent on Fuseki-unreachable case
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

crawler.graph.hydrated.description: Crawler hydrator emitted one event per Hydratable class after the batch insert pass; reports counts and failures for that class (#2827).

fields.count: Number of records hydrated in this batch
fields.failures: Count of failed inserts in this batch

crawler.graph.orphan.detected.description: Crawler hydrator detected a graph record whose source file no longer exists on disk; flagged stale in Fuseki (#2827).

fields.last_seen_at: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the orphan was detected
fields.deleted_path: Filesystem path of the deleted source

deploy.artifact.verified.description: Installed artifact post-deploy verification — invariant evidence for deploy-domain (#2775). Same artifact must reach the same running state (same cdhash, same on-disk sha256).

fields.installed_cdhash: Codesign cdhash of binary at deploy location

deploy.completed.description: Building-pipeline deploy step finished for one crate (#2774). Emitted by chorus-deploy CLI after binaries are atomic-installed to ~/.chorus/bin/ and dependent services are kickstarted. Per-binary detail lives in binary.deployed; this event is the crate-level signal the act workflow sequences on. #3270 — carries the ground-truth envelope (verb/step/outcome/cdhash/live_main/artifact_class) sharing the `trace` join key so trace.html?trace=<id> renders this verb alongside hook.decision (#3252) and the other verbs as one flow.

fields.artifact_class: #3270 — rust-daemon (kickstarted) | rust-cli (no daemon); TS services emit on their own paths
fields.cdhash: #3270 — loaded cdhash: post-install codesign of the installed file the daemon loads (== built, verified #3222)
fields.live_main: #3270 — is what's now live origin/main? true|false (canonical: HEAD==origin/main) | na (werk preview slot) | unknown (no origin/main ref). Kills the silent merged≠live false-green.
fields.commit: Source commit SHA (short) at deploy time
fields.duration_ms: End-to-end deploy slice duration in milliseconds
fields.trace: Shared join key — CHORUS_TRACE_ID (|| session_id), auto-stamped by chorus-log (#2897/#3252). NEVER a per-call uuid.

deploy.failed.description: Building-pipeline deploy step failed for one crate (#2774 review feedback from Kade). Emitted by chorus-deploy CLI before non-zero exit. Consumers should bind to this event for deploy failures — never to absence of deploy.completed.

fields.reason: Failure class — install-script-missing | binary-missing | install-fail (kickstart failures are advisory-only and don't fail the deploy)
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

deploy.freeze.activated.description: Deploy freeze activated — blocks all deploys

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

deploy.verification.completed.description: Card verification completed (board-ts done triggers this)

design.refresh.failed.description: chorus_design_refresh MCP refused with typed reason (#2900). Refusal taxonomy: template-violation, design-not-found, manifest-missing, summary-missing, regenerate-fail.

fields.detail: Specific section / line / card_id that triggered the refusal
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

design.refresh.started.description: Service-design refresh begun (#2900). Emitted by chorus_design_refresh MCP on entry. Paired with design.refreshed on success or design.refresh.failed on refusal.

fields.design_name: Filename stem of the design (e.g., build-and-deploy-service-design)
fields.cards_referenced_count: Number of card refs found in the design at refresh entry

design.refreshed.description: Service-design cite-density layers regenerated from card statuses (#2900). Emitted by chorus_design_refresh MCP on success. Human-authored sections (summary block, Overview, As-Is, To-Be) are untouched; MCP-generated sections (Completeness Contract, Path-to-close, Gaps, Implementation Plan, References) are rewritten from current board state.

fields.sections_regenerated: Comma-separated list of data-section IDs that were rewritten
fields.cards_referenced: Comma-separated list of card IDs whose status was pulled
fields.diff_lines: Net line delta against the prior version of the file

design.scaffold.inserted.description: chorus_design_refresh auto-conformed a service-design doc that lacked the canonical template structure (#2900). Inserted summary-block scaffold and/or data-section attributes on standard H2 headings so the same refresh command works on any next doc with one command. Emits before design.refreshed in the same run.

fields.scaffolded: Comma-separated list of what was scaffolded — e.g. 'summary-block,path-to-close.data-section,gaps.data-section,references.data-section'

guard.classify.decided.description: Sensitive paths hook fired — classified file read attempt

guard.rule.decided.description: Infrastructure guardrail hook fired — deny/ask/allow on prohibited commands

guard.scrub.blocked.description: Write scrubber hook fired — credential or internal pattern detected in shared file write

harvest.notify.sent.description: Push notification sent for harvest completion or failure

hydration.partial.divergent.description: Crawler reconciliation found a record present on one side (SQLite or Fuseki) but missing on the other; emitted per divergent record (#2827).

fields.missing_side: Which store is missing the record (fuseki or sqlite)

library.health.failed.description: Bedroom-side probe: one or more Library services unreachable/degraded (#2835)

fields.failures: Count of services that failed health check
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

library.health.passed.description: Bedroom-side probe: all Library services healthy on this run (#2835)

manifest.entry.added.description: New entry written to ~/.chorus/manifest.json by build-signed.sh after codesign — the queryable cache of build records (#2791). Emitted on new {commit, crate, identifier, cdhash} only; idempotency hits do NOT re-emit. Manifest is the cross-domain interface for build-domain (writes) and deploy-domain (reads).

fields.commit: Source commit SHA (short) — same as build.artifact.hashed
fields.crate: Cargo crate name — same as build.artifact.hashed
fields.identifier: Installed binary identifier — same as build.artifact.hashed
fields.cdhash: Codesign cdhash — same as build.artifact.hashed; the binding identity
fields.sha256: SHA-256 of signed binary — same as build.artifact.hashed; informational
fields.build_time: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the build
fields.builder_host: Hostname of machine that built it — same as build.artifact.hashed

ops.audit.checked.description: Chorus audit check result — pass/warn/fail for a specific gate

ops.container.changed.description: Container health or running state transition

ops.cost.reported.description: Daily cost and usage report emitted

ops.defect.detected.description: Defect poller found a new defect and carded it

ops.disk.checked.description: Disk usage check — emitted on session start, full audit, and periodic health

pair.roles.swapped.description: Driver and navigator swapped roles during a pair session

pair.session.started.description: Pair programming session started — strong-style pairing with navigator and driver

protocol.boot.completed.description: Protocol boot sequence completed — envelope close with summary

protocol.boot.started.description: Protocol boot sequence started — envelope open for grouping boot steps

protocol.close.completed.description: Protocol close-out sequence completed — envelope close with summary

protocol.close.started.description: Protocol close-out sequence started — envelope open for grouping close steps

protocol.step.completed.description: Individual protocol step completed (boot or close)

fields.step: Step name (board-check, state-files, briefs, claudemd, health, next-session, auto-promote, etc.)

role.nudge.delivered.description: Nudge message delivered to target role's session

role.nudge.sent.description: Nudge message sent from one role to another

search.query.executed.description: Search query executed — covers FTS, semantic, and hybrid across Chorus API and Gathering app (#1107)

seed.brief.written.description: Brief file written to a role's inbox from a routed seed

seed.captured.description: Seed classified and persisted to domain graph

seed.dropped.description: Seed dropped — no routable content, no hashtag, no correlation

seed.hashtag.correlated.description: Pending seed correlated with a hashtag from the same sender within the correlation window

seed.received.description: SMS webhook received — Twilio payload validated, before dedup check

seed.recovered.description: Seed recovered — spine event emitted retroactively for a seed that arrived during app downtime

seed.routed.description: Seed routed to destination domain via hashtag or default routing

self.biometric.transposition_rate.description: Typing correction rate — backspace-after-keystroke sequences per 30s window. Proxy for cognitive load / stress.

service.deploy.completed.description: agent-state.sh deploy verb succeeded: chorus-deploy + kickstart + cdhash verify all passed. running cdhash matches just-installed cdhash. #2605.

fields.post_cdhash: Cdhash of binary after deploy (matches running)

service.deploy.failed.description: agent-state.sh deploy verb failed at one of: chorus-deploy invocation, kickstart, or cdhash verification (running PID does not match just-installed cdhash). #2605.

fields.step: Where it died: chorus-deploy / kickstart / verify
fields.reason: Typed reason: build-fail / install-fail / kickstart-fail / cdhash-divergence / verify-timeout
fields.exit_code: Non-zero exit code from the failing step
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

service.deploy.started.description: agent-state.sh deploy verb invoked. Emitted before chorus-deploy + kickstart + cdhash verify. #2605.

fields.pre_pid: Running PID before deploy (empty if not running)
fields.pre_cdhash: Cdhash of currently-installed binary before deploy

service.rollback.completed.description: agent-state.sh rollback verb succeeded. Running cdhash matches target prior cdhash. #2605.

fields.post_cdhash: Cdhash after rollback (matches running, matches target)

service.rollback.failed.description: agent-state.sh rollback verb failed at one of: prior-cdhash lookup, binary restore, kickstart, or cdhash verification. #2605.

fields.step: Where it died: lookup / restore / kickstart / verify
fields.reason: Typed reason: no-prior-cdhash / restore-fail / kickstart-fail / cdhash-divergence
fields.exit_code: Non-zero exit code from the failing step
fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

service.rollback.started.description: agent-state.sh rollback verb invoked. Reads chorus-manifest for prior cdhash, restores prior binary, kickstarts, verifies. #2605.

fields.pre_cdhash: Cdhash that's about to be rolled back
fields.target_cdhash: Prior cdhash from manifest being restored

session.docscan.completed.description: Domain doc scan at session close — role validated their vertical docs for staleness (DEC-058, #312)

test.delta.description: Test run completed with delta vs prior run. #2193.

test.suite.result.description: Per-suite result from the nightly backstop — one event per suite (green AND red) so which test sets pass/fail is queryable + dashboardable, not just an aggregate count nudge. #3484.

fields.suite: Suite name (basename of the suite path)
fields.owner: Owning role the result routes to
fields.reason: For a fail: one-line cause from the captured failure log (a red explains itself; #3484)

workflow.manifest.created.description: Workflow manifest auto-created when card moves to Now

abort.refused.description: Werk verb-substep — `abort` mechanical step under `commit`: `abort.refused` (#3513 verb-substep).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.
change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

build.refused.description: Werk `build` verb — `refused` phase (build.refused). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

build.skipped.description: Werk `build` verb — `skipped` phase (build.skipped). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

build.started.description: Werk `build` verb — `started` phase (build.started). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

card.done.description: Card-lifecycle event: `card.done` — the card's state, distinct from verb events (#3513).

card.unpulled.description: Card-lifecycle event: `card.unpulled` — the card's state, distinct from verb events (#3513).

card.wip.description: Card-lifecycle event: `card.wip` — the card's state, distinct from verb events (#3513).

cards.move.idempotent.description: Card-lifecycle event: `cards.move.idempotent` — the card's state, distinct from verb events (#3513).

commit.completed.description: Werk `commit` verb — `completed` phase (commit.completed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

commit.conflict.description: Werk `commit` verb — `conflict` phase (commit.conflict). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

commit.failed.description: Werk `commit` verb — `failed` phase (commit.failed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

commit.refused.description: Werk `commit` verb — `refused` phase (commit.refused). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

commit.started.description: Werk `commit` verb — `started` phase (commit.started). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

consumer.rebuild.completed.description: Werk verb-substep — `consumer` mechanical step under `build`: `consumer.rebuild.completed` (#3513 verb-substep).

consumer.rebuild.started.description: Werk verb-substep — `consumer` mechanical step under `build`: `consumer.rebuild.started` (#3513 verb-substep).

content.verified.description: Werk verb-substep — `content` mechanical step under `merge`: `content.verified` (#3513 verb-substep).

continue.failed.description: Werk verb-substep — `continue` mechanical step under `commit`: `continue.failed` (#3513 verb-substep).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

continue.refused.description: Werk verb-substep — `continue` mechanical step under `commit`: `continue.refused` (#3513 verb-substep).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

decision.refused.description: Werk verb-substep — `decision` mechanical step under `accept`: `decision.refused` (#3513 verb-substep).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

deploy.approved.description: Werk `deploy` verb — `approved` phase (deploy.approved). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

deploy.cdhash.diverged.description: Werk `deploy` verb — `cdhash.diverged` phase (deploy.cdhash.diverged). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

deploy.cdhash.matched.description: Werk `deploy` verb — `cdhash.matched` phase (deploy.cdhash.matched). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

deploy.cdhash.unverified.description: Werk `deploy` verb — `cdhash.unverified` phase (deploy.cdhash.unverified). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

deploy.skipped.description: Werk `deploy` verb — `skipped` phase (deploy.skipped). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fetch.done.description: Werk verb-substep — `fetch` mechanical step under `pull/sync`: `fetch.done` (#3513 verb-substep).

fetch.warn.description: Werk verb-substep — `fetch` mechanical step under `pull/sync`: `fetch.warn` (#3513 verb-substep).

gh.registered.description: Werk verb-substep — `gh` mechanical step under `merge`: `gh.registered` (#3513 verb-substep).

lock.acquired.description: Werk verb-substep — `lock` mechanical step under `merge`: `lock.acquired` (#3513 verb-substep).

merge.approved.description: Werk `merge` verb — `approved` phase (merge.approved). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.branch.push.failed.description: Werk `merge` verb — `branch.push.failed` phase (merge.branch.push.failed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

merge.branch.pushed.description: Werk `merge` verb — `branch.pushed` phase (merge.branch.pushed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.completed.description: Werk `merge` verb — `completed` phase (merge.completed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.landed.description: #3517 cicd→build/deploy TRIGGER (ADR-049): a card landed on origin/main; fires build+deploy of landedCommit for changedUnits. Inline from werk-merge, on ALL success returns (self-heal on a transport-dropped land).

fields.landedCommit: origin/main HEAD after the merge — the one sha build+deploy anchor to (not the role's slot)
fields.changedUnits:
dependency-driven deploy set (crate:/pkg:

) the land changed; retires the hardcoded allowlist

merge.idempotent.description: Werk `merge` verb — `idempotent` phase (merge.idempotent). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.pr.create.description: Werk `merge` verb — `pr.create` phase (merge.pr.create). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.pr.resolve.retry.description: Werk `merge` verb — `pr.resolve.retry` phase (merge.pr.resolve.retry). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

merge.refused.description: Werk `merge` verb — `refused` phase (merge.refused). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

fields.failureClass: change|tooling discriminator (#3513) — change = work-under-test bad (counts DORA CFR); tooling = pipeline mechanics (excluded); default tooling.

merge.started.description: Werk `merge` verb — `started` phase (merge.started). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).

pull.completed.description: Werk `pull` verb — `completed` phase (pull.completed). Verb-phase event (#3513 naming law).
